title: ICAI Issues Important Advisory Against Unauthorized Communications and Fraudulent Messages (May 08, 2026)
content:
# ICAI Issues Important Advisory Against Unauthorized Communications and Fraudulent Messages (May 08, 2026)

Ek important update hai! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne ek advisory issue ki hai, warning against unauthorized calls, emails, WhatsApp messages, and fraudulent communications. Yeh advisory Members, Students aur general public ko target karne wale unscrupulous individuals aur entities ke against hai.

*   **What's Happening:** Kuch log ICAI ke Office Bearers, Officials, Departments, Committees ya Branches bankar, fake calls, emails, SMS, aur WhatsApp messages bhej rahe hain.
*   **Purpose of Fraud:** Ye fraudsters exam details, membership matters, training, empanelment, seminars, recruitment, disciplinary issues, aur payments se related galat information de rahe hain. Inka intention personal information, sensitive documents, banking details, aur OTPs mangna hai.
*   **ICAI's Clarification:**
    *   ICAI kabhi bhi sensitive personal information jaise passwords, OTPs, CVV numbers, ya internet banking credentials phone calls, messages ya emails ke through nahi mangta.
    *   Sabhi official communications ICAI ke authorized channels se hi issued hote hain.
    *   ICAI warns that impersonation aur fake information circulate karna illegal hai aur ispe punitive actions ho sakte hain.
*   **Advice to Stakeholders:** Members, Students aur public ko advise kiya gaya hai ki aisi communications se savdhan rahein. Unverified links ya files par click na karein, aur suspicious communications ko immediately ICAI ko report karein.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/post.html?post_id=23348)

*Published on: 10 May 2026*
